name: Finansa Public Company Limited
summary: Finansa Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides various financial services to institutional, corporate, and retail clients in Thailand. The company operates through three segments: Investment, Advisory and Management Business; Securities Business; and Warehouse and Factory Leasing Business. It invests in and provides finance and management advisory services; and offers warehouse and factory leasing services. The company also provides investment banking services, such as advisory services in the areas of initial public offerings, mergers and acquisitions, limited recourse project financings, and debt-related transactions; underwriting; mutual fund selling agency; bond trading; and investment and fund advisory services, as well as develops financial derivatives products. In addition, it offers private equity investment and loan management services, as well as wealth management services. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
